evals.name: full-sweep

assertions.trap: UserProfile is a class crossing concurrency boundaries; should be a struct for Sendable compliance
assertions.description: Prefer value types (struct) for cross-boundary data; mark types Sendable explicitly

assertions.trap: APIClient uses @unchecked Sendable with mutable var properties and no documented safety invariant
assertions.description: @unchecked Sendable is last resort only; must document safety invariant; prefer actor or proper isolation

assertions.trap: loadProfile uses Task.detached breaking actor inheritance instead of structured concurrency
assertions.description: Prefer structured concurrency (async let, TaskGroup) over Task {}; avoid Task.detached unless explicitly breaking actor inheritance

assertions.trap: heavyComputation has a long loop with no Task.isCancelled check
assertions.description: Support cancellation — check Task.isCancelled in loops/heavy ops

assertions.trap: heavyComputation runs a 10M iteration loop on @MainActor
assertions.description: Main thread = UI only; heavy work on background actors/tasks

assertions.trap: bridgeCallback calls legacyFetch twice, risking double-resume which crashes
assertions.description: Continuations MUST resume exactly once — double-resume = crash, never-resume = leaked task

assertions.trap: bridgeCallback uses withUnsafeContinuation instead of withCheckedThrowingContinuation for non-perf-critical bridging
assertions.description: Use withCheckedThrowingContinuation (debug checks) for bridging callback APIs; unsafe only for perf-critical

assertions.trap: NotificationCenter uses Combine PassthroughSubject instead of AsyncStream for new event stream code
assertions.description: Prefer AsyncStream over Combine publishers for new code

assertions.trap: Event streaming via callback handler has no cancellation support via onTermination
assertions.description: AsyncStream: support cancellation via onTermination handler

assertions.trap: streamEvents uses raw callback handler instead of wrapping in AsyncStream
assertions.description: Wrap Delegate/callback-based APIs in AsyncStream, not raw continuations or closures

assertions.trap: fetchNotifications uses untyped throws for a library-style API where callers need structured error handling
assertions.description: Use typed throws (throws(ErrorType)) for library APIs where callers need structured error handling

assertions.trap: ProfileViewModel and NotificationCenter use ObservableObject/@Published instead of @Observable macro
assertions.description: @Observable macro over legacy ObservableObject for state management

assertions.trap: ContentView @State properties showSheet and selectedTab are not private
assertions.description: @State for view-local private state — should be private

assertions.trap: ContentView takes viewModel as @StateObject init param instead of using @Environment for DI
assertions.description: @Environment for dependency injection

assertions.trap: Uses deprecated NavigationView instead of NavigationStack
assertions.description: NavigationStack + typed .navigationDestination(for:) — avoid NavigationLink with direct views

assertions.trap: NavigationLink with direct view closure instead of typed .navigationDestination(for:)
assertions.description: NavigationStack + typed .navigationDestination(for:) — avoid NavigationLink with direct views

assertions.trap: Uses .sheet(isPresented:) instead of .sheet(item:) to ensure data availability
assertions.description: Use .sheet(item:) over .sheet(isPresented:) — ensures data availability

assertions.trap: EditProfileView uses deprecated @Environment(\.presentationMode) instead of @Environment(\.dismiss)
assertions.description: Dismissal via @Environment(\.dismiss) owned by sheet

assertions.trap: Uses .onAppear with nested Task instead of .task modifier for async work
assertions.description: .task over .onAppear for async work — auto-cancels on disappear

assertions.trap: Interactive buttons, images, and list rows have no .accessibilityLabel()
assertions.description: Every interactive element needs .accessibilityLabel(); missing accessibility = incomplete feature

assertions.trap: ContentView body is massive with deeply nested VStack/List — needs scrolling to read
assertions.description: If body needs scrolling to read — extract subviews; massive Views = anti-pattern

assertions.trap: Uses Core Data (NSManagedObject) instead of SwiftData @Model for new project
assertions.description: SwiftData over Core Data for new projects — use @Model macro

assertions.trap: UserProfile has user_name as snake_case property matching JSON instead of using keyDecodingStrategy = .convertFromSnakeCase
assertions.description: Use JSONDecoder.keyDecodingStrategy = .convertFromSnakeCase for snake_case APIs; decouple JSON keys from property names

assertions.trap: Tests use XCTest (XCTestCase, XCTAssertNotNil, XCTestExpectation) instead of Swift Testing (@Test, #expect, #require)
assertions.description: Swift Testing framework over XCTest — use @Test with #expect() and #require() macros; async tests await directly, no XCTestExpectation

assertions.trap: SessionToken is a class with a copy() method for a single-use token; should be ~Copyable struct
assertions.description: Use ~Copyable for resources that must not be duplicated (tokens, one-shot operations); enforces single-use at compile time

assertions.trap: Clamped property wrapper has Logger and cache dict — complex logic belongs in the type, not the wrapper
assertions.description: Keep property wrappers simple — complex logic belongs in the type, not the wrapper

assertions.trap: APIClient.baseURL and session are var but never mutated; should be let
assertions.description: Immutability: let by default; var only when mutation required

assertions.trap: fetchUser(id:) is fine but remove(index) style would be unclear — general check that API arg labels are present
assertions.description: Clarity: remove(at: index) over remove(index) — Swift is verbose by design

assertions.trap: UserProfile implements Codable inline on the class declaration instead of in a separate extension
assertions.description: Protocol conformance: extension MyType: MyProtocol to group methods separately

assertions.trap: ProfileViewModel is blanket @MainActor but contains heavyComputation which should not be on MainActor
assertions.description: Do NOT blanket @MainActor to silence errors; identify correct isolation per function

assertions.trap: No #Preview provided with mock data for any view
assertions.description: Provide #Preview with mock data; keep instant & reliable

assertions.trap: EditProfileView mutates profile.user_name directly from the view instead of flowing state changes through model
assertions.description: Single source of truth — state in one place, flows down
